title: Fix customer addition not working on Home tab

requirements.summary: Fix the 'Add Customer' functionality on the Home tab so that submitting the AddCustomerModal form successfully creates a new customer in the backend and reflects the new customer in the customer list without requiring a page reload.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Add Customer button on the Home tab opens the AddCustomerModal.
Filling in a valid name and phone number and submitting the form calls the backend addCustomer (or equivalent) function without throwing an error.
After successful submission, the new customer appears in the customer list on the Home tab.
A success toast notification is shown after the customer is added.
If the backend call fails, an error toast is shown and the modal remains open with the entered data.
The customer count in the SummaryBanner increments after a new customer is added.

file_operations.description: Fix the form submission handler to properly call the addCustomer mutation from useQueries hook, handle success/error cases with toast notifications, close the modal on success, and ensure proper error handling that keeps the modal open on failure while preserving user input.

Verify that the AddCustomerModal is properly wired with state management for opening/closing the modal, ensure the customer list query is properly configured to refetch after mutations, and confirm the add customer button triggers the modal correctly.

Review and fix the addCustomer mutation to ensure it correctly calls the backend addCustomer method with proper argument types (name: string, phoneNumber: string), implements cache invalidation for the customers query to trigger automatic refresh of the customer list, and handles success/error states properly for toast notifications.
